title: Santarém, Alentejo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Santarém, Alentejo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Santarém is a city in Alentejo with a population of 30,000. A historic city overlooking the Tagus River, known as the Gothic capital of Portugal with its many medieval churches.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
